data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tax-exemption support where applicable, but the evidence does not provide any information or checks related to tax-exemption handling. The prior steps indicate successful bookings, but they do not confirm whether tax-exemption rules were applied or if there was any mechanism to support tax-exempt transactions. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of tax-exemption support being applied or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for tax-exemption support
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify tax-exemption support.
